_source: Planetfall p.66, Injury table + Grunt Casualties
_description: D100 injury table for Step 9. Grunt casualties use a separate D6 roll.
_notes: Characters removed from play as casualties roll on this table. Civvies do not roll (never recurring). Bots do not roll (marked Broken instead, repaired in Step 2).

character_injuries.name: Seriously Wounded
character_injuries.description: The character must recover for 5 campaign turns.

character_injuries.name: Moderately Wounded
character_injuries.description: The character must recover for 4 campaign turns.

character_injuries.name: Lightly Wounded
character_injuries.description: The character must recover for 2 campaign turns.

character_injuries.name: School of Hard Knocks
character_injuries.description: The character is okay and gains +1 XP as they reflect on their experiences.

grunt_casualties._description: Roll 1D6 for each grunt that became a casualty.
grunt_casualties.permanent_description: They have either died, their injuries were so severe they cannot continue the mission, or they opt to retire.
grunt_casualties.okay_description: They are okay and recover in time for the next mission.
